name: Cajun Catfish with Spicy Strawberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fillets in a large shallow dish. Season fish with salt, black pepper, and hot pepper sauce; cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
2. In a small saucepan, combine preserves, vinegar, soy sauce, cocktail sauce, garlic, and horseradish. Simmer sauce over low heat, stirring occasionally while preparing the catfish.
3. In a shallow bowl, blend cornmeal and flour.
4. Drain the catfish and dredge it in the cornmeal mixture, coating all sides.
5. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat. When hot, add the catfish and sauté until browned on both sides. Drain well on paper towels and keep warm.
6. Spoon 1/4 cup sauce on each plate. Top with catfish fillets. Garnish with sliced strawberries and parsley, if desired.
